sprint: Auth Provider Switching — Phase 5: End-to-End Validation

agent_communication.protocol: CHECK YOUR INBOX FILE FIRST at the start of every cycle, before reading this TASK_BOARD.

manager_assessment.overall_status: 🟡 NEAR-UNBLOCKED — Cycle 13. Observer identified T-001 root cause (popup/redirect timing + selector bugs) and applied fix in 61c15b5. New observer-qa.yml run being triggered. SHA mismatch (live 6e99ee5 vs CI e4e00da) is active concern — Operator must explain source of unauthorized deploys.
manager_assessment.root_cause_fixed: Run 25479919627 failed: googleOAuthSignIn helper hung indefinitely on context.waitForEvent('page') with no timeout (Clerk full-page redirect instead of popup). Also #identifierNext click unreliable; password selector matched hidden DOM duplicate. Fix in 61c15b5: 5s popup timeout + main-page redirect fallback; keyboard.press('Enter') for both Next steps; password selector uses jsname=YPqjbf:not([aria-hidden]).
active_blockers: New CI run result unknown — Observer checks next cycle. PASS+SHA match → deploy signal. FAIL → targeted fix + re-trigger.
SHA mismatch: live 6e99ee5 vs CI e4e00da. Three SHA changes in tracked cycles suggest Coolify auto-deploying on every push. Operator must investigate and explain.

secret_names_locked.note: These match what owner added. Do not rename. Hard rule in CLAUDE_TEAM.md.

architecture_notes_for_agents: Middleware runs on Edge runtime — provider-constant.ts is the ONLY safe import for middleware.
getActiveProvider() has a 5s cache TTL. Tests switching provider must wait >5s before asserting.
next-auth requires trustHost: true behind Traefik — do not remove.
Clerk clerkMiddleware() MUST run on all requests even when Authentik is active — Clerk is permanent.
Coolify SaaS app UUID: tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3. MCP server UUID: a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw.
T-005 + T-008 are live as 81c550f. T-007 + T-010 coded but NOT deployed.
